name: stylelint-config
description: Shared Stylelint configuration for CSS/SCSS linting with SCSS support, optional Prettier integration, and CSS property ordering.
when_to_use: Shared Stylelint configuration for CSS/SCSS linting with SCSS support, optional Prettier integration, and CSS property ordering
avoid: Not for projects on older Node.js (<20) or Stylelint (<16.18.0) versions.
not_for: Not for projects on older Node.js (<20) or Stylelint (<16.18.0) versions.

name: stylelint-config
description: Gravity UI Stylelint configuration for linting CSS and SCSS files. Includes SCSS support via postcss-scss and optional sub-configs for Prettier integration and CSS property ordering.
when_to_use: Setting up CSS/SCSS linting in a Gravity UI project
Enforcing consistent CSS style across a team or monorepo
When you want optional property ordering or Prettier integration for styles
avoid: Requires Node.js >= 20 and Stylelint >= 16.18.0 — do not use with older toolchains
PostCSS must be installed separately as a peer dependency
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev stylelint postcss @gravity-ui/stylelint-config`. Create `.stylelintrc` with `{ "extends": "@gravity-ui/stylelint-config" }`. For Prettier integration add `@gravity-ui/stylelint-config/prettier`. For property ordering add `@gravity-ui/stylelint-config/order`.
